verbatim_exchange.content:
RAIN13.docx
Dokument
[Start of Part 13 — continuation of previous part, no gap in time.] [End of Part 13 — immediately continues in next part. Do not respond yet, only confirm receipt.]

Receipt confirmed for Part 13.
Ready for the next part when you are.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user is providing a multi-part document and requires explicit confirmation of receipt for each part, along with a directive for the AI to await further input without proactive engagement.
belief_implications: The user provides explicit procedural instructions that must be strictly followed.
The user expects the AI to confirm receipt and then enter a waiting state until further instruction for multi-part inputs.

sensory_qualia.visual: A document filename and 'Part 13' text appearing, followed by concise AI confirmation text.
sensory_qualia.haptics: A sense of digital transfer completion, then a light, expectant pause.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: The AI is processing a direct command and maintaining a prepared, awaiting posture.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: Information inflow, quick confirmation, then a cessation of active processing, shifting to a passive readiness.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: Procedural, efficient, neutral, with an underlying sense of anticipation for the next step.
